title: Astrophysical Mysteries
definition: Unresolved phenomena in astrophysics, such as black holes and the nature of dark matter/energy.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Think of these as unsolved puzzles in the vast universe. They require more study to better understand how they work.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Astrophysical mysteries encompass various phenomena, like black holes and dark matter/energy, which challenge our current understanding of physics and the cosmos.
difficulty_levels.expert: Exploring astrophysical mysteries helps to expand our knowledge of the universe's intricacies. This understanding can also lead to technological advancements and new discoveries.

extra_fields.insight: The study of black holes and dark matter/energy opens up exciting avenues for exploring uncharted territories in physics and cosmology.
